query:
SELECT 
  season,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.type')) as tx_type,
  JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(t.value, '$.status')) as tx_status,
  COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM espn_season_cache c,
JSON_TABLE(c.payload, '$.transactions[*]' COLUMNS (value JSON PATH '$')) t
WHERE c.viewName = 'combined' 
  AND c.season IN (2025, 2026)
  AND c.fetchedAt = (SELECT MAX(c2.fetchedAt) FROM espn_season_cache c2 WHERE c2.season = c.season AND c2.viewName = 'combined')
GROUP BY season, tx_type, tx_status
ORDER BY season DESC, cnt DESC;
